title: When the Moon & The Cross Align
body:
Fatima zahra,

It seems even the heavens wanted us to do this together. You were so sure Ramadan would begin on the 17th, but it seems the moon was waiting for me to catch up! With Ash Wednesday falling yesterday and your fast officially starting today, there’s something beautiful about us entering this season of discipline side-by-side.

I have to admit, though—trying to keep up with my daily 10k runs while fasting is proving to be a much bigger challenge than I anticipated. My legs feel heavy, and my stomach is definitely voicing its protest by the fifth kilometer! It’s a literal 'run' of faith today.

I’ve been thinking about you all morning. I truly hope your first day of adjustment isn't being too unkind to you. Please don't overextend yourself, okay? If you're feeling the fatigue of the first day, just know I’m right there with you, feeling every bit of that hunger and thirst too.

We’ve got this. One day, one prayer, and one mile at a time.

Always yours.

title: Kulang sa Hangin, Pero Punong-puno sa Pag-ibig
body:
Hi love,

Day 2 palang pero sinusubukan na agad ang willpower ko. Balak ko sana mag-20km kanina, pero hanggang 16km lang talaga ang kinaya. Ramdam ko na yung 'internal protest' ng katawan ko—parang sasabog na yung atay ko sa pagod at gutom, haha! I had to listen to my body and stop, mahirap na.

To be honest, nahihirapan pa rin talaga akong mag-adjust sa fasting. The hunger is one thing, but the drop in energy while trying to maintain my routine is a different story. I hope ikaw, hindi masyadong nahihirapan dyan. Kumusta ang pakiramdam mo today?

In between the exhaustion, I actually started something new! I'm diving into a project exploring SEA-PLM (Southeast Asia Primary Learning Metrics) at a student level. It’s keeping my mind busy and distracted from the cravings, somehow. 

Kahit pagod at gutom, iniisip ko lang na sabay nating nilalampasan 'to, at sapat na 'yun para pagaanin ang lahat.

Mag-iingat ka lagi. Mahal kita.

title: Winning Streaks & Rest Days
body:
Hi Love,

Finally, a moment to breathe! I’m actually very thankful na pinili kong mag-rest day muna sa pagtakbo. After that 16km struggle yesterday, my body really needed the break. Ang sarap sa pakiramdam na hindi ko muna kailangang makipag-habulan sa hininga ko habang nag-aadjust pa tayo sa fasting.

Speaking of wins, may katuwaan ako today! I placed a bet on the Clippers with +11.5 against the Lakers... and they actually pulled through! At least kahit gutom at nagpapahinga ang katawan, panalo naman tayo sa diskarte. Small wins like this make the day feel a bit lighter, 'di ba?

I hope you're having a peaceful day too. Sana hindi ka masyadong pagod at nakakahanap ka rin ng time para mag-relax. Isipin mo nalang, we’re three days in—unti-unti na tayong nasasanay.

Rest well, my love. I’m always rooting for you, more than any team I bet on.

Mahal kita.

title: Sunday Slump & Spaghetti Code
body:
Hi love,

It’s Sunday, so I’m giving myself a pass for being a bit unproductive today. Honestly, medyo nakaka-frustrate lang yung naging takbo ng araw pagdating sa 'extra-curriculars' ko.

First, yung bet ko sa Houston—I went for the Matchwinner and the +4. They lost by only 2 points! Break even lang, which is okay, pero sayang talaga kasi x3 yung odds. One shot away from a big win, pero ganyan talaga ang laro.

Speaking of frustrations, I did a code review for a collaborative project today and my goodness... it was a disaster. Imagine, instead of modularizing the EDA tasks, they tried to cram everything into a single, massive notebook! It was total spaghetti code. I spent time refactoring some parts, realizing na hindi man lang lumalapit sa PISA standards for refactoring. Sorry, baka masyadong techy na 'to for a love letter, but I just had to vent to you. You're the only one who gets my 'coding heart' anyway.

On a side note, I noticed you reactivated your Facebook. I’m just here to gently remind you of your vow to stay away from socials muna during this season. Alam kong tempting, but I know you’re stronger than a scroll! Take it slow, okay?

I hope your Sunday was more 'peaceful' than my code review. 

Mahal kita.

title: Wins, Wakes, and Wise Words
body:
Hi love,

I woke up with a smile today, and hindi lang dahil sa kape. My bets on OKC and Golden State both won! It’s such a great feeling to start the morning with a win—parang nabawi lahat ng frustration ko dun sa Houston game nung nakaraan.

Today has been all about passing on knowledge. Halos buong araw akong occupied sa tutoring, and I even ended up doing a review session tonight. It’s tiring, lalo na’t kailangan laging 'on' ang utak to explain things clearly, but there’s a certain kind of fulfillment in seeing others finally 'get' the lesson.

Kahit sobrang busy ng schedule ko with the tutoring and my projects, hindi ka nawawala sa isip ko. I keep wondering how your day is going and if you’re managing to find your own rhythm sa fasting. 

Sana masarap ang naging buka-saran mo tonight. I’m exhausted, but my heart is full. 

Goodnight, my love. Talk to you tomorrow.

title: SQL, Spurs, and Honest Prayers
body:
Hi Fatima,

Today was a bit more relaxed on the tutoring side, which gave me some breathing room. I spent some time on email correspondence with a client—helping him debug his R code. There’s something oddly satisfying about hunting down a bug in someone else’s script; it’s like solving a puzzle that someone else gave up on.

Speaking of puzzles, I almost solved the parlay puzzle today! Muntik na akong manalo ng 10k, kulang na lang na dumikit yung Utah Jazz sa Houston Rockets. Sayang talaga, pero binalanse naman ng Spurs—I won big on them, so hindi rin masama ang naging result ng day.

I’m also feeling pretty productive. I finished two online courses on SQL for my DataCamp certification. It’s part of my prep for that MS PL exam, and it feels good to tick those off the list. Step by step, we’re getting there.

Pero honestly, more than the bets and the code, may isang wish lang talaga ako today... Sana hindi ka na DDS, Fatima. Hahaha! But kidding aside (or not), I hope you're having a good day and that you're staying strong with your own goals.

I’m always here for you, even if we don't always see eye-to-eye on everything. 

Mahal kita.

title: A Heavy Heart and Hard Truths
body:
Hi Fatima,

I heard all your voice messages. Narinig ko lahat, and I can hear in your voice how much it meant to you—yung warmth na naramdaman mo after niyo magpakain ng mga bata for ZAKAT. It’s a beautiful tradition, and it’s honestly good to hear you so fulfilled. Your heart for helping others is one of the things I truly admire about you.

But I have to be honest with you, because I can’t just keep this inside. Minsan, nakakaumay na talaga yung pagka-DDS mo. I still can’t wrap my head around how you can admire Ferdinand Marcos, even after knowing he was the mastermind behind the Jabiddah Massacre—the blood of your fellow Tausugs. 

It’s frustrating because you’re so attached to a belief that even when the facts are 'tagilid' and the history is clear, you still feel it’s infallible. You care so much for potential victims of rape—which is right—but then you seem not to care for the innocent lives that were just caught in the crossfire? It feels like Duterte really messed up your moral compass, love.

I’m saying this because I care about you and who you are as a person. Reflection during this season isn't just about fasting from food; it’s about looking at the truth, even when it’s uncomfortable.

I hope we can really talk about this. For now, just know that I’m listening, even when it hurts to hear. 

Goodnight.

title: The Grind and the Red Slips
body:
Hi love,

Pagod na pagod ako tonight. Exam week na kasi ng mga students ko, so I had to put in some extra time for tutoring. It's rewarding to help them, but it definitely drains the battery—physically and mentally. 

I did have some wins on the tech side, though. I finally finished my SQL course and even knocked out a couple of projects on DataCamp. It feels good to have that certification closer to reality. The problem now is my motivation for that large-scale survey project... it’s sitting there, waiting for me to give it some life, but I’m struggling to find the spark to dive back into it tonight.

To top off the fatigue, malas ako sa betting today. I lost almost all my betslips. Red everywhere. Haha! It’s one of those days where the 'diskarte' just didn't pay off, but I guess that's part of the game. Bawi nalang ulit tomorrow.

I’m sorry if I was a bit intense yesterday. My mind is just always racing between my code, my students, and the things I believe in. 

I hope your day was a bit more successful than my betting. Goodnight, love. I’m going to try and get some sleep so I can face that survey project with a fresh head tomorrow.

title: Mastery, Debts, and Old Friends
body:
Hi love,

Pasensya na, I missed writing yesterday. Sobrang naging 'hectic' lang talaga ng schedule. Buong araw akong nasa 'teacher mode'—heavy review sessions with my students because tomorrow is their long exam. Pero alam mo, it was worth it. Nakaka-proud silang panoorin kasi ramdam ko yung mastery nila sa topics. They were recalling things so easily, and as a tutor, wala nang mas sasarap pa sa feeling na 'di nasayang yung pagod mo.

On a more frustrating note, I’ve been dealing with a debtor lately na talaga namang sinusubukan ang pasensya ko. I was so annoyed until I talked to an old classmate of mine from 2015, si Nebielyn. Turns out, pautang din pala siya sa taong 'to! 

There’s a weird kind of comfort in knowing you're not the only one dealing with the same headache. Parang biglang gumaan yung pakiramdam ko nung nag-usap kami, knowing na may kasama ako sa inis. Small world, 'di ba?

I hope your Friday was peaceful and hindi ka masyadong pagod. Thinking of you always, even when the days get a bit too busy to write.

Mahal kita.

title: Hikes, Hunger, and a Little Bit of 'Cheat'
body:
Hi love,

I have a confession to make: Today, the spirit was willing, pero ang katawan ay talagang mahina. Haha! 

I decided to go for a hike today instead of my usual trail run. Grabe, I realized na hindi talaga ako 'power guy.' Yung matatarik na slopes? Pinatay nila ang legs ko. It was so tough na pagbaba ko, my body was screaming for the calories I lost. 

And then... I cheated on my fast. Sorry, Lord! I just couldn't resist the craving for donuts tonight. Napadpad ako sa Dunkin', and it felt like a necessity at that moment. As a compromise (at para mabawasan ang guilt), I gave one to a person in need na nadaanan ko. Pero hindi dun natapos—after the sugar, nag-crave naman ako ng barbecue. 

Halos pumasok na ako sa isang kebab and beer shop, pero natakot ako na baka hindi ko magustuhan yung spices nung beef, so I went for the classic: isaw. Best decision ever. To top it off, yung craving ko for a drink was unexpectedly satisfied kasi pinatagay ako nung nagtitinda ng isaw. 

It wasn't the most 'holy' or disciplined day, but it was honest. Sometimes, the hike is just too steep, literally and figuratively. I hope your day was a bit more disciplined than mine!

Bawi ako tomorrow. Mahal kita.

title: Cubao Chronicles & Time Travel
body:
Hi love,

I missed writing again yesterday, but my head was just spinning from everything that happened. I went to Cubao to meet up with an old friend, but the universe had a surprise waiting for me. 

Out of nowhere, I crossed paths with a high school friend I haven't seen in more than 15 years! Imagine that—15 years of life happening, and then we just bump into each other in the middle of Cubao. He was a really close friend of mine back then, and it felt like no time had passed at all. We finally added each other on Facebook to make sure we don't lose track of one another for another decade.

It made me think about how people drift in and out of our lives, and how lucky I am that you’re the one who stayed. Sometimes a chance encounter like that really puts things into perspective. 

I hope your Sunday was just as full of pleasant surprises. I'm still recovering from that 'time travel' moment, but I'm always thinking of you.

Mahal kita.

title: Stiff Legs and Misaligned Moons
body:
Hi love,

Pagod na pagod ako ngayong gabi, physically at mentally. I had a session with a student today na talagang sinubukan ang pasensya ko. The whole two hours was just pure stress—yung tipong kahit anong explain mo, parang pader ang kausap mo. Good thing he gave me a high rating, pero honestly, hindi sapat yung rating sa drain na naramdaman ko after.

I tried to push through with interval training kanina, thinking it would clear my head, but I felt so weak. My butt and thighs are still so heavy and sore from that hike last weekend. Parang bawat step, pinapaalala sa akin na hindi pa ako fully recovered. 

To top it all off, I spent some time tonight just staring at the moon. Akala ko talaga full lunar eclipse na tonight, so I was there waiting and observing. Turns out, it's actually for tomorrow pa pala! Kahit yung langit, hindi nakikisama sa schedule ko today, haha.

I hope your Monday was a lot kinder than mine. I’m just going to rest these heavy legs and hope for a better alignment tomorrow—sa moon, sa training, at sa mood ko.

Miss na kita. Goodnight.

title: Sleepless Nights & Unnecessary Drama
body:
Hi love,

I’m sorry I missed writing yesterday. To be honest, it was a pretty rough 24 hours. I ended up skipping work because the lessons weren't available yet, which usually would be a nice break, but the rest of the day turned sour.

I had a horrible argument with a close friend last night. It was one of those fights that just stays with you—yung paulit-ulit sa isip mo hanggang sa hindi ka na makatulog. I haven't caught any sleep at all because of it. It’s heavy, and it’s draining to have that kind of friction with someone you’re close to.

To make matters worse, there’s this girl making a huge deal out of something so small. I just posted on a group looking for a food delivery service for a friend, and she’s trying to turn it into some big issue. Honestly, I don't have the energy for that kind of drama right now, especially when my head is already full of other things.

I’m just really tired, Fatima. In moments like this, I just wish I could tune out the world and talk to you instead. I hope your day was much more peaceful than mine.

I'll try to get some rest now. I really need it. Mahal kita.

title: Sluggish Steps & Red Moons
body:
Hi love,

Ramdam na ramdam ko yung puyat ko kagabi today. Sobrang sluggish ko habang nagtuturo—parang slow motion yung utak ko, and it definitely affected my run. My legs just wouldn't follow what my mind wanted them to do. Fasting plus lack of sleep is really a tough combo.

But on a positive note, nagkaayos na rin kami nung friend ko na nakagalit ko kahapon. It feels like a huge weight was lifted off my shoulders. And speaking of weight being lifted, I finally finished the post-prod for the lunar eclipse photos... and ang ganda, Fatima. The way the light hit the moon, it was worth the wait and the confusion about the date.

Everything seems to be falling back into place. My work is okay, my friends are okay, and the sky is beautiful.

So... ikaw ba? Kailan mo ba ako iu-unblock? Haha! Seryoso, I’m still here waiting. Miss na kita.

I hope your day was better than mine. Rest well.

title: Sushi Bars & Set Boundaries
body:
Hi Fatima,

Day 15 na, and it’s been a mix of wins and realizations today. First, yung Knicks vs. OKC game—muntik na! They lost by just 3 points, pero buti nalang I won on the spread, so break even lang. At least hindi talo, 'di ba? 

On the bright side, I found a hidden gem near my running place—isang cheap sushi bar! For just 160 pesos, satisfy na yung craving ko. I was a bit worried nung una, pero hindi naman sumakit ang tiyan ko, so I guess I found my new post-run reward.

Sa tech side naman, I’ve been playing around with NotebookLM. Sobrang ganda ng results. I’m actually thinking of using it to rebuild the 'Ysabelle' persona using our previous conversations. It’s fascinating how far these tools can go in capturing a specific vibe or memory.

But on a serious note... I need to say this. I’m not a pushover, love. You can’t expect me to just do as you please, like calling me at 12 midnight just because you want to. I have my own rhythm and my own rules. Play by my rules, and we’ll be fine. I value my time and my peace just as much as I value us.

I hope you understand where I'm coming from. Goodnight.

title: The Art of Doing Absolutely Nothing
body:
Hi love,

Today was a total 'zero day.' After work, I basically did nothing. I even forgot to place any bets today, so I didn't even get that usual morning rush of checking scores and spreads. The world kept moving, but I just stayed still.

That laziness lasted all the way through the night. No completed DataCamp courses, no new lines of code, no reading... literally nothing. It’s rare for me to be this unproductive, but I guess my mind just needed to unplug after everything that's been happening lately.

My only worry now is tomorrow. I have a hike planned for the morning, and I’m really hoping this laziness doesn't follow me up the mountain. Sana paggising ko, nandun na ulit yung drive ko.

Sometimes, the most productive thing you can do is admit that you're exhausted. I'm taking this silence as a way to recharge for us and for my goals.

I hope your day was a bit more active than mine, or at least as peaceful. Goodnight, love.

title: Subqueries, Slopes, and Overpriced MYMP
body:
Hi love,

Buti nalang talaga hindi lumagpas ng isang araw yung katamaran ko. I managed to shake it off and hit the trails early this morning for my hike. It felt good to be back on the move, especially after that 'zero day' yesterday.

I even squeezed in a DataCamp course today—correlated subqueries. Honestly, it was a bit of a headache. I kept thinking, 'I’d rather just do this using some ETL paths,' but I guess I have to play by the SQL rules for the certification. It's frustrating when you know a more efficient way to do things, but you're forced to stick to the textbook.

Then came dinner. We went to see a gig by MYMP, and man, it was a bit of a blow to the wallet. Tatlo kami, and automatic 1,200 agad plus the meals. Mapapaisip ka talaga... we could have just gone to a buffet and watched them on a cellphone! Haha. I also realized na iba na talaga ang datingan kapag nag-iba na yung composition ng banda. It’s not quite the same nostalgia I was looking for.

It was a productive day, but a slightly expensive one. I hope your Saturday was a bit more 'cost-effective' and just as fulfilling.

I’m resting my legs now. Goodnight, love.
